rules.rule: Browse Files button must trigger a hidden file input
rules.check: Button with class .file-upload__trigger or .drop-zone__trigger must have a corresponding <input type='file' hidden> and JS click handler
rules.rationale: Native file input is required for browser file selection; the visible button is a proxy

rules.rule: Remove buttons must have aria-label identifying the file
rules.rationale: Without an accessible name, screen readers cannot distinguish which file is being removed

rules.rule: Drop zone must have an accessible region label
rules.rationale: Users need to identify the drop zone by region when navigating via landmarks

rules.rule: Disabled state must prevent all interaction
rules.check: .file-upload[aria-disabled=true] and .drop-zone[aria-disabled=true] must set pointer-events: none and cursor: not-allowed on interactive descendants
rules.rationale: Disabled components must not accept mouse or keyboard input

rules.rule: File item error state must expose error message
rules.check: .file-item--error must show .file-item__error-row. Error row must have role='alert'
rules.rationale: Error messages must be announced by assistive technology

rules.rule: CSS must use component-level tokens, not primitive values
rules.check: No hex, rgba, or pixel values in component selectors. All values must reference CSS custom properties
rules.rationale: Component tokens allow theming and systematic updates

rules.rule: Loading state must be communicated to assistive technology
rules.check: .file-item in loading state must include role='status' or equivalent live region text
rules.rationale: Screen readers must announce upload progress

rules.rule: Single upload and file item must mirror layout in RTL
rules.check: [dir=rtl] selectors must flip alignment of .file-upload__header and .file-item__row
rules.rationale: Arabic/RTL users expect right-to-left reading order

rules.rule: Drag-hover state must be toggled via JS class
rules.check: .drop-zone.is-drag-hover must apply success border and background. Class toggled on dragover/dragleave/drop events
rules.rationale: CSS state requires accurate JS event bridging for correct visual feedback

rules.rule: Focus ring must be visible on all interactive elements
rules.rationale: Keyboard users must have visible focus indicators

rules.rule: Component-level tokens must be added to token.css
rules.check: All --file-upload-*, --drop-zone-*, --file-item-* tokens listed in analysis.md Missing Tokens must be defined in token.css
rules.rationale: Token definitions should not live solely as fallback values in component CSS

rules.rule: Feedback icon SVG must be sourced from icon library
rules.check: .file-item__icon placeholder SVG must be replaced with actual success/error icons
rules.rationale: Placeholder SVGs do not match the design system icon library

rules.rule: Multiple upload should announce file list changes
rules.check: .file-upload__files should have aria-live='polite' so additions/removals are announced
rules.rationale: Screen reader users benefit from hearing file list changes without manual navigation

rules.rule: Drag-and-drop JS should be provided in application layer
rules.check: dragover, dragleave, drop event handlers must toggle .is-drag-hover and handle dropped FileList
rules.rationale: CSS provides all visual states; behavior requires application-layer JS
